title: Shulker-In-Shulker
description: Shulker in Shulker lets you store shulker boxes inside other shulker boxes, making inventory management simpler and more flexible. No more clutter—pack smarter and carry more, all while keeping the vanilla feel intact.
body:
📦 Shulker in Shulker

Ever wished shulker boxes could go one level deeper?
Shulker in Shulker lets you place shulker boxes inside other shulker boxes—no commands, no exploits, just pure convenience.

This mod removes the vanilla restriction and allows nested shulkers, making large-scale storage, resource hauling, and late-game organization way easier.

✨ Features

Put shulker boxes inside other shulker boxes

Works naturally with normal inventory interactions

No complex configs—install and play

Perfect for builders, hoarders, and technical players

⚠️ Notes

Deep nesting may increase inventory size—use responsibly

Best suited for singleplayer or trusted servers
